scripts.db:migrate:local: cd backend && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build && mkdir -p ../backend/public && rm -rf ../backend/public/* && cp -r dist/* ../backend/public/
scripts.deploy: cd backend && npm install && cd .. && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.postdeploy:
echo '
⚠️  IMPORTANT: Set your secrets if you have not already:
  cd backend
  npx wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET
  npx wrangler secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
  npx wrangler secret put GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET
'
